title: LISTOS PARA APRENDER - 211info
text: MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES ABC LISTOS PARA APRENDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting trainings, educational home visits, parenting issues support groups, parenting materials, referrals, case management, and developmental screening. Offers parents support with guidance on how to deal with a child's tantrums, questions about a child's developmental stages, and alternative types of discipline. 7820 NE Holman Street Suite B5 Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Spanish speaking parents with children ages 0-5 or who are pregnant Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, some evening appointments available Email (503) 258-4200 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 258-4200 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to fill out referral form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland (Multnomah County only) Services: Home Based Parenting Education * Hispanic/Latino Community Parent Support Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Parenting Materials * Hispanic/Latino Community Parenting Skills Classes * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT MENTOR PROGRAM MUTUAL SUPPORT - PARENT SUPPORT GROUPS PUBLIC SAFETY - PARENTS AS TEACHERS TRAINING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES ABC
